title: Elytra Armor Trims
description: Make elytra trimmable like armor, choose between 198 different trims !
body:
<details>
<summary>get more trims for your items:</summary>

- Sword trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/sword-trims
- Elytra trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-elytra-trims
- Mace trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/ks-mace-trims
- Pickaxe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/pickaxe-trims
- Axe trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/axe-trims
- Shovel trims ! https://modrinth.com/datapack/shovel-trims

</details>

Have you ever wanted to use an armor trim on your elytras to make them look nicer with your fancy armor ?

Now you can with Elytra Trims !

With 18 trims and 11 materials, choose between 198 different elytras the one you want !

/!\ make sure to download the resourcepack: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kspack

![elytra trims](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UWhKSUrl/images/c3e2c721c9dff8717b4bd9368a3fa9339e6a1fa9.png)



If you have any issue/question, contact me on discord! (@nugrevan) : https://discord.gg/SxarRKTw8k
Any feedback will be greatly appreciated, thanks !



Geyser/bedrock support : @Toxicdust on discord made a port of all the trims datapacks for GeyserMC, since those are not supported on modrinth, you can find it on the [discord server](https://discord.com/channels/1407508835643428988/1441199863831330929/1509831172174118956)
